headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 14, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees suffered a shutout defeat at the hands of the Baltimore Orioles, who won 7-0. Adley Rutschman led the Orioles' offense with a home run, three RBIs, and a 1-for-3 batting line. The Los Angeles Angels dropped a 2-4 decision to the Cleveland Guardians, unable to overcome a strong performance from the Guardians' pitching staff. Zach Neto led the Angels' offense with a 2-for-3 night, including a home run and 2 RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Cal Raleigh (Seattle Mariners), Jimmy Herget (Colorado Rockies), Brooks Kriske (Athletics), Robby Snelling (Miami Marlins), Francisco Alvarez (New York Mets), Rhett Lowder (Cincinnati Reds), Drew Pomeranz (Los Angeles Angels), and Dylan Beavers (Baltimore Orioles).

The Washington Nationals secured a hard-fought 8-7 win over the Cincinnati Reds, overcoming a late deficit to claim the victory. Tyler Stephenson led the Reds' offense with a home run and 4 RBIs. The Colorado Rockies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates, securing a 10-4 victory. Mickey Moniak led the Rockies' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 5 runs.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place, including the Seattle Mariners trading LHP José Suarez to the Athletics for cash, the Los Angeles Dodgers trading OF Jose Requena to the Arizona Diamondbacks for CF Alek Thomas, and the San Francisco Giants trading C Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Dominant 7-0 Loss**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees suffered a shutout defeat at the hands of the Baltimore Orioles, who won 7-0. Adley Rutschman led the Orioles' offense with a home run, three RBIs, and a 1-for-3 batting line.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dropped a 2-4 decision to the Cleveland Guardians, unable to overcome a strong performance from the Guardians' pitching staff. Zach Neto led the Angels' offense with a 2-for-3 night, including a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Edge Reds in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a hard-fought 8-7 win over the Cincinnati Reds, overcoming a late deficit to claim the victory. Tyler Stephenson led the Reds' offense with a home run and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Rout Pirates 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates, securing a 10-4 victory. Mickey Moniak led the Rockies' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 5 runs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Pittsburgh Pirates, marking a tough outing for the team. Impact hitters for the Pirates included Ryan O'Hearn, Konnor Griffin, Endy Rodríguez, and Jared Triolo.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Historic Loss to Reds**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals fell to a 15-1 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds, marking a lopsided victory for the home team. Impact players for the Reds included Elly De La Cruz, Spencer Steer, and Matt McLain, while Foster Griffin and Chase Burns stood out on the mound.

top_news.title: **Mariners C Cal Raleigh Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners catcher Cal Raleigh has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right oblique strain.

top_news.title: **Athletics Acquire LHP José Suarez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics have bolstered their pitching staff with the addition of left-handed pitcher José Suarez, acquired from the Seattle Mariners in exchange for cash. Suarez joins the Athletics' roster following the trade.
